title: Create Specular
description: Adds PBR maps to (most of) the create blocks/items
body:
# CREATE SPECULAR
Adds various normal maps and specular maps for the block/items added by the popular Create Mod and some for it's addons (Create: Connected and Clockwork).

![Belts with tunnels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6b20616e231848d916ecf13507158542c7d9d77_0.webp)

## Additions (currently added)
- Almost all of the andesite stuff
- All copper stuff
- The tools (wrench, linked controller)
- Not that much creative stuff (just the motor)
- Some Clockwork gas stuff
- Industrial Iron stuff
- Belts, funnels, tunnels, chutes and smart chutes
- Almost all processing blocks

Warning: Only tested on Complementary Shaders!
